archetype: 5 (Luxury) mixed with 7 (Electric/Neon accents) - Premium Japanese Aesthetic
core_philosophy: Every screen must feel expensive. No cluttered layouts. Use spacing similar to Apple apps (generous padding, precise optical alignment). Avoid generic gradients; use solid deep backgrounds with subtle glassmorphism and crisp 1px borders.

screens.Onboarding: Hero image (torii gate night) with dark overlay. Title 'Master Japanese', subtitle in Noto Sans. JLPT level selection uses elegant large cards. Bottom fixed Primary Button.
screens.Home: Daily Goal ring (Apple Fitness style) at top. Streak flame prominent. 'Continue Learning' large card with subtle #8B5CF6 glow. Horizontal carousel of Recommended Lessons. Recent conversations list.
screens.Chat: Main AI chat interface. Bubbles show large Japanese text, small romaji below, and tap-to-expand translation. Floating Mic button at bottom right (Press-to-talk). Inline grammar tags (JLPT N5/N4).
screens.Speaking_Practice: Immersive dark screen. Massive centered 'Orb' (using Reanimated) that pulses when speaking. Real-time waveform. 4-metric score cards (Pronunciation, Fluency, Accuracy, Naturalness) appear after processing.
screens.Scenario_Picker: Grid layout (2 columns). Each scenario card has a subtle dark Japanese background image, title, XP badge, and difficulty indicator. 12 scenarios (Restaurant, Convenience Store, etc.).
screens.Scenario_Play: Objective checklist at the top (glassmorphism header). Role-play chat interface below. AI acts as the character (e.g., store clerk).
screens.Grammar_Library: Segmented control for JLPT levels (N5-N1). Expandable accordion cards. Each card shows rule, formula, and beautiful example sentences with audio icons.
screens.Vocab_Flashcards: Tinder-style swipeable cards or standard flip cards with 3D animation (Reanimated). Front: Huge Kanji. Back: Reading, Romaji, Meaning, Example.
screens.JLPT_Hub: 5 massive cards stacked, each showing % progress. Entry point for mock tests. Sectional progress bars (Listening, Vocab, Grammar, Reading).
screens.Dashboard: Apple Activity style rings. Bar charts for weekly XP. Heatmap for daily study streak. Grid of beautiful achievement badges (locked are grayscale, unlocked are vibrant).
screens.Settings: Standard iOS style grouped list. Theme, Voice speed, Native Language, Subscription management (Premium shiny card at top).

animations.page_transition: Fade and slight scale-up (0.95 to 1.0) using React Navigation/Reanimated.
animations.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 with high spring stiffness.
animations.speaking_orb: Continuous breathing scale (1.0 to 1.1) with blur shadow expansion.
animations.skeleton_loading: Shimmer effect across #1B1B1B cards using linear gradient translation.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app. DO NOT use DOM elements like div, span, or standard CSS classes. Use View, Text, Image, ScrollView from react-native.
Use StyleSheet.create or Nativewind if configured. Map exactly to the provided color tokens and spacing.
CRITICAL: Add 'testID' to all interactive and key informational elements (e.g. testID='login-form-submit-button') for React Native Testing Library. Also use 'data-testid' if running on web.
Do NOT use generic gradients. Rely on solid dark backgrounds (#111111) and dark cards (#1B1B1B) with precise 1px borders (#27272A).
Implement bottom tab navigator with a floating center button.
Use react-native-reanimated for any smooth transitions or gestures (like swipeable flashcards or speaking orb).
